# comfyui_uploaded_image (Resource)

Uploads a local image into ComfyUI and tracks the resulting remote file path.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Place a local input.png next to this example before applying it.
resource "comfyui_uploaded_image" "example" {
  file_path = "${path.module}/input.png"
  filename  = "docs-example-input.png"
  overwrite = true
  type      = "input"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_path` (String) Local source file path to upload.

### Optional

- `filename` (String) Requested filename, updated to the actual remote filename returned by ComfyUI.
- `overwrite` (Boolean) Whether the upload should overwrite an existing file when ComfyUI allows it.
- `subfolder` (String) Optional ComfyUI subfolder for the uploaded file.
- `type` (String) ComfyUI storage type for the uploaded file: input, output, or temp.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Remote ComfyUI file identifier in {type}/{subfolder}/{filename} form.
- `sha256` (String) SHA-256 hash of the local source file at upload time.
- `url` (String) ComfyUI /view URL for the uploaded file.
